entities.name: AMYCOLATOPSIS SP. BCA-696
entities.description: An agriculturally important actinobacterial strain known for biocontrol and plant growth-promotion properties

entities.name: GENOME ASSEMBLY
entities.description: The process of developing and characterizing the draft genome sequence of a species

entities.name: BIOCONTROL
entities.description: The ability of an organism to suppress the growth of pathogens or pests

entities.name: CHARCOAL ROT
entities.description: A fungal disease that is targeted by the biocontrol properties of Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH-PROMOTION
entities.description: The ability of a microorganism to enhance the growth and development of plants

entities.name: NEXT-GENERATION SEQUENCING
entities.description: A high-throughput DNA sequencing technology used to develop the draft genome of Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: BIOSYNTHETIC GENE CLUSTERS
entities.description: Groups of genes that are physically linked and work together to produce secondary metabolites

entities.name: BIOSYNTHETIC PATHWAYS
entities.description: A series of chemical reactions occurring within a cell to produce a specific molecule

entities.name: VANCOMYCIN
entities.description: A glycopeptide antibiotic produced by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696 that inhibits gram-positive bacteria

entities.name: GRAM-POSITIVE BACTERIA
entities.description: Pathogenic bacteria whose growth is inhibited by the antibiotic vancomycin

entities.name: COMPARATIVE GENOMICS
entities.description: The analysis of the BCA-696 genome against other closely related Amycolatopsis strains

entities.name: ORTHOLOGOUS GENES
entities.description: Genes in different species that evolved from a common ancestral gene by speciation

entities.name: ANTIBIOTIC BIOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: The biological process of producing antibiotics, enriched in the unique genes of BCA-696

entities.name: ANTIBIOTIC RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of an organism to resist the effects of antibiotics, enriched in the unique genes of BCA-696

entities.name: SIDEROPHORE PRODUCTION
entities.description: A plant growth-promoting trait involving the production of iron-chelating compounds

entities.name: CHITINASE PRODUCTION
entities.description: A biocontrol trait involving the production of enzymes that degrade chitin

entities.name: CELLULASE PRODUCTION
entities.description: A trait involving the production of enzymes that degrade cellulose
